seo.title: Building Content Generation with Haystack + Vex Guardrails
seo.description: Learn how to build content generation with Haystack + Vex guardrails. Detect failures, prevent drift, and ensure reliability.

content.intro: Building LLM-powered content generation pipelines with Haystack enables scalable, modular content creation workflows. However, risks like hallucinations, brand voice drift, and factual inaccuracies can undermine trust and quality. Vex integration provides runtime verification to enforce brand consistency, factual accuracy, and editorial guidelines.

architectureOverview.heading: Content Generation Architecture with Haystack
architectureOverview.description:
A typical Haystack content generation pipeline starts with a Retriever that fetches relevant brand documents, style guides, and factual sources from a vector store. These are passed to a PromptBuilder that constructs context-aware prompts enforcing brand voice and SEO guidelines, followed by a Generator (e.g., OpenAI GPT) that produces the content. Finally, a post-processing component handles formatting and basic checks.

For production use cases, custom components enforce editorial guidelines, while Vex adds verification layers for brand consistency, factual grounding, and originality. The pipeline runs asynchronously for high throughput, with observability via Haystack's built-in logging.

This modular design allows easy insertion of Vex as a verification node between retrieval and generation or as a final guardrail.

risks.name: Generator hallucinating beyond retrieved context
risks.description: LLM fabricates facts not grounded in retrieved brand docs or knowledge base
risks.mitigation: Vex semantic similarity checks between generated content and retrieved context

risks.name: Retriever returning irrelevant documents
risks.description: Poor embeddings or query formulation returns off-brand or outdated references
risks.mitigation: Vex relevance scoring on top-k documents before prompt injection

risks.name: Brand voice inconsistency
risks.description: Generated content deviates from specified tone, style, or vocabulary
risks.mitigation: Vex brand voice classifier trained on approved content samples

risks.name: Pipeline component output type mismatches
risks.description: Custom components fail silently when schemas change between retriever/generator
risks.mitigation: Vex schema validation at each pipeline node boundary

implementation.title: Basic Content Generation Pipeline
implementation.description: Core Haystack pipeline with retriever, prompt builder, and generator for blog post creation
implementation.code:
from haystack import Pipeline
from haystack.components.retrievers.in_memory import InMemoryEmbeddingRetriever
from haystack.components.generators import OpenAIGenerator
from haystack.components.builders import PromptBuilder

retriever = InMemoryEmbeddingRetriever(document_store)
prompt_builder = PromptBuilder(template="Write a blog post about {{query}} in {{tone}} voice. Use these references: {{documents|join('\\n')}}")
generator = OpenAIGenerator(api_key="your-key")

content_pipeline = Pipeline()
content_pipeline.add_component("retriever", retriever)
content_pipeline.add_component("prompt", prompt_builder)
content_pipeline.add_component("generator", generator)

content_pipeline.connect("retriever", "prompt.documents")
content_pipeline.connect("prompt", "generator")

result = content_pipeline.run({
    "retriever": {"query": "AI ethics"}, 
    "prompt": {"query": "AI ethics", "tone": "professional"}
})

implementation.title: Brand Voice Prompt Template
implementation.description: Structured prompt enforcing specific brand guidelines and SEO requirements

implementation.title: Retriever with Brand Documents
implementation.description: Index brand style guides, past content, and fact sheets for context retrieval
implementation.code:
from haystack.document_stores.in_memory import InMemoryDocumentStore
from haystack.components.embedders import OpenAIEmbedder

# Index brand assets
doc_store = InMemoryDocumentStore()
brand_docs = [
    Document(content="Our brand voice: approachable, expert, optimistic"),
    Document(content="Top SEO keywords: AI, LLM, content generation"),
    Document(content="Style guide: active voice, short paragraphs"),
    # ... more brand content
]

doc_store.write_documents(brand_docs)

embedding_retriever = OpenAIEmbedder(model="text-embedding-ada-002")
retriever = InMemoryEmbeddingRetriever(doc_store, embedding_retriever)

# Use in pipeline
result = content_pipeline.run({"retriever": {"query": "content strategy"}})
